alkylation reagent: alkylated (14 mM iodoacetamide, 30 min at room temperature in the dark)
alkylation concentration: alkylated (14 mM iodoacetamide, 30 min at room temperature in the dark)
collision energy: fragmented in HCD with normalized collision energy of 40%
fragmentation method: fragmented in HCD with normalized collision energy of 40%
instrument: an ETD enabled LTQ Velos Orbitrap mass spectrometer
ionization type: coupled with LC-MS/MS by an EASY-nLC system through a Proxeon nanoelectrospray ion source.
labeling: 30 μg of protein from each group was used for iTRAQ kit labeling.
